title: Grilled Kenyan Tempeh
description: A vegetarian take on traditional Kenyan cuisine, this dish combines the nutty flavor of tempeh with the smoky taste of grilled vegetables.

ingredients.name: tempeh
ingredients.notes: marinated in soy sauce and lime juice

instructions: Marinate tempeh in a mixture of lime juice and soy sauce for at least 30 minutes.
Brush coconut oil on tempeh and grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Meanwhile, grill sliced onion and bell pepper for 5-7 minutes, or until tender.
Add chopped tomato to grill and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve grilled tempeh with vegetables and a side of your choice.
